name: HNO International, Inc.
summary: PART I Company Overview HNO International, Inc., a Nevada corporation (herein referred to as we , us , our , HNO and the Company ), focuses on systems engineering design, integration, and product development to generate green hydrogen-based clean energy solutions to help businesses and communities decarbonize in the near term.
